description: anvilml-server: frontend Local mode (ServeDir + SPA fallback)
context: Create src/frontend.rs: pub fn add_frontend_route<S>(router:Router<S>,mode:&FrontendMode)->Router<S> where S:Clone+Send+Sync+'static. Local{path}: if path exists mount ServeDir::new(path).fallback(ServeFile::new(path.join("index.html"))) via router.nest_service("/",svc) — NOT route_service. If path missing, log warn and mount service_fn inline-HTML via nest_service. Other modes: return router unchanged. Wire in lib.rs: clone config before Arc::new(state), call add_frontend_route after /v1+/health routes, before .with_state(). Unit tests read from ./test-frontend/index.html (committed fixture). NOTE: ServeDir has no .index_file() method. Use nest_service not route_service.

In frontend.rs handle FrontendMode::Headless: return router unchanged — register no catch-all; non-API paths fall through to axum's default 404. Verify: set frontend.mode=headless in anvilml.toml (or ANVILML_FRONTEND__MODE=headless); cargo run --features mock-hardware; curl / returns 404; curl /health still 200.

Add hyper/hyper-util deps if absent. In frontend.rs handle FrontendMode::Remote{url}: mount catch-all proxy handler via router.nest_service("/",service_fn(proxy)) — NOT route_service. Proxy forwards headers (strip hop-by-hop), rewrites Host, streams response body. For proxying a custom frontend dev server; not for BloomeryUI (SindriStudio's job). Verify: python -m http.server 5173 --directory test-frontend; ANVILML_FRONTEND__MODE=remote ANVILML_FRONTEND__URL=http://localhost:5173 cargo run; curl / shows proxied page; curl /v1/system served locally.
